     the Fermi energy is    -0.3523 ev

!    total energy              =  -10339.97870507 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.3E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.14938655 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -10339.82931852 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -221414.85871788 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  111735.74054046 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4254.87736086 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  103596.15299985 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.98678009 Ry

     total magnetization       =    90.05 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    96.19 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  48 iterations
